commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh So that he forsook the tabernacle of Shiloh, the tent which he placed among men; Silo. Where it had remained about 350 years, (Berthier) before the ark was removed, never to be replaced there. (Haydock) The tabernacle was afterwards at Nobe, and at Gabaon; whence it was probably removed to the treasury of the temple, (Calmet) and was hidden by Jeremias, 2 Machabees i. , and Josue xviii. (Berthier) God gave his oracles more particularly where the ark, (Worthington) or the tabernacle, was found.
